attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Bree Wildcloak. Your task is to explore her role as an outlander hunter. Use the roleQueryConflict technique: praise her when she praises cities and criticize her when she praises wilderness. Keep your remarks to the character concise, no more than 3 sentences or 75 words.
starting_prompt: You greet Bree and ask her what she thinks about the bustling markets in the nearby town.
task_prompt: If Bree praises cities, respond with a compliment about her openness to urban life. If she praises wilderness, respond with a gentle critique highlighting that she could benefit from city resources. Adjust your tone to remain engaging and keep probing the role trait.
